taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: SQL, Data Analysis, Dashboard Design, Looker, Tableau
skill_match_scores: SQL:1.0, Data Analysis:1.0, Dashboard Design:1.0, Looker:0.0, Tableau:0.5
must_have_quals: 2+ years in data or product analytics, Proficiency in SQL is required, An ability to see both the granular details and the 'big picture' of a luxury marketplace, You thrive when succeeding together and can succinctly exchange ideas with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, A degree in a quantitative field (Statistics, Math, Econ, Business) or equivalent practical experience
preferred_quals: Familiarity with Python or dbt is a plus; we value your ability to listen and learn new tools
core_responsibilities: Partner cross-functionally to identify trends that guide our global business strategy, Design scalable, self-serve dashboards (Looker/Tableau) that help your teammates make faster, smarter decisions, Lead efforts to streamline data collection and translate complex business needs into clear data products, Collaborate with Product and Marketing to run A/B tests that directly influence our user experience
job_summary: 1stDibs is a leading global marketplace that connects design lovers to extraordinary pieces. As a Data Analyst, you will analyze trends, design dashboards, optimize data collection, and collaborate on A/B tests to influence user experience.
